node.statement: (Corollary: BP for infinite-dimensional pointed cones) Let V be a (possibly infinite-dimensional) real vector space, V^+ ⊆ V a pointed closed cone, α_1, ..., α_m ∈ V* linear functionals, C = {x ∈ V^+ : α_j(x) = b_j}. If x is extreme in C, then d_F = dim(span(face_{V^+}(x))) ≤ m. Proof: By node 1.7 (Weis-Shirokov finiteness), d_F is finite. Then Theorem 1 (node 1) gives d_F ≤ m.
